title: Solid White Paper Honeycomb Ball (20cm) 1 Piece - Hanging Decoration, Versatile & Elegant Party Decor
features: SOLID WHITE HONEYCOMB BALL DESIGN: Add a touch of sophistication and elegance to your event with our 20cm solid white paper honeycomb ball, perfect for creating a stunning visual impact and enhancing any party atmosphere.

HIGH-QUALITY PAPER MATERIAL: Crafted from durable and eco-friendly paper, this hanging decoration is not only visually appealing, but also lightweight and easy to set up, ensuring hassle-free party preparation.

VERSATILE & STYLISH PARTY DECOR: Ideal for a wide range of events and celebrations such as birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, or Halloween; this versatile honeycomb ball complements various color schemes and adds a contemporary touch to your venue.
ALL-IN-ONE PARTY SOLUTION: Our 1-piece set provides effortless and stylish party décor that comfortably fits any budget, saving time and money on coordinating multiple decoration pieces.

EASY TO HANG & REUSABLE: With its convenient hanging loop, you can quickly install and position the honeycomb ball to your desired location, adding dimension to your space, and when the party is over, simply fold it flat for easy storage and future use.
description: Product Description Have a lively atmosphere to your event with our disposable White Honeycomb Ball. 1 Honeycomb Ball - 8". This honeycomb decoration features cardstock and white tissue paper decorative pieces that extend out to form balls. This elegant tissue honeycomb ball is perfect for weddings, events, banquets, and decoration for parties. This product is made of durable tissue paper, easy to assemble and use. Made with eco-friendly tissue paper that is disposable and biodegradable. Box Contains 1 x Honeycomb Ball
